definition: Likely to arrive or happen later than the expected or planned time.

sentences.text: I’m _____ because the traffic is heavier than usual.
Sorry, I’m _____, but I should be there in ten minutes.
She called her manager to say that she was _____ for the meeting.

definition: Not having a paid job at the present time.

sentences.text: He was _____ for three months before finding a new job.
She used the time while she was _____ to improve her technical skills.
The support program helps _____ people prepare for job interviews.

definition: A spoken or written request asking someone to attend an event or take part in something.

sentences.text: I received an _____ to attend the company’s career event.
Thank you for the _____, but I will not be able to join the meeting.
The interview _____ included the date, time and location.
